description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc syntax checks that runs on every push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow performs syntax checks for various C++ standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20) with and without STL, both with and without forcing C++03 implementation, on an ubuntu-22.04 environment.
